use_cases: Navigation links with scrambled text reveal on hover for interactive navigation
Interactive headings with character scrambling effects for modern landing pages
CTA buttons with progressive text reveal animation to draw attention
Logo or brand text with hover scramble effect for playful branding
Feature highlights with text scrambling on interaction for engaging product showcases
ai_summary: A lightweight text component that applies a scrambled character effect on hover, progressively revealing the original text from start, end, or center. Built with Framer Motion for smooth animations and supports customization of speed, iterations, and character sets. Ideal for adding interactive text effects to navigation, headings, and calls-to-action in modern SaaS and creative tool interfaces.
